text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Tracen Academy tryouts—an event where debut
hopefuls show off their racing talents in the hopes of being scouted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the morning of the big day arrives, I quickly head toward the
course to find...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? You must be... the lost trainer I met the other day?
choice_data_list:
I'm kind of embarrassed to be remembered like
that...

I'm kind of embarrassed to be remembered like
that...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, forgive me. I couldn't help it—that was quite a memorable
day.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I presume you're here to watch the tryouts? I'll be running in the final
group, so I'd be happy if you stay to see it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, I must be off to get prepared. It's rather sunny today, so do
take care to keep in the shade.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder still has that serene tone as she heads towards the
track with a tranquil smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The races fly by, moving swiftly from one to the next.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! My group's up next... I-I'm so nervous!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Spe, you need to loosen up. Careful, or you'll turn to stone
before the race starts, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Stone?! I-I won't be able to run very well like that!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It's all right, Spe. Remain calm... Stay relaxed...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Remember, "Do your best and let the heavens do the rest." You've
trained with all your might for this day, have you not?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You need only trust in yourself, run true to your heart, and the
outcome will surely be glorious.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aw, Grass! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Think nothing of it... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ummm... El? Might I ask you to move over?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? Uh, like this?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: What's this about, Grass? ...Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the next moment, a racer loses control on the turn and hurtles off
the track straight towards them!

text_block_list.name: Racer
text_block_list.text: Oh nooooo! Gosh, sorry!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Are you hurt? You should have someone check on you, to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Racer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I will... I'm really sorry about that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Uh, take care now...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Dios mío! She almost scared me to death!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But, Grass, that was amazing! I don't know how you could stay so
calm!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it's nothing. I'm simply glad El wasn't injured.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That's Grass Wonder, right? This is such an important day, but she's
totally chill! That mindset of hers could be a killer weapon.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She's not just mentally strong... Judging from her record, she's a force
to be reckoned with. No wonder she's the most anticipated in the
final group.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Grass Wonder draws eyes from all around, the time for her race
finally begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Continuing to hold everyone's attention, she calmly sticks to the
middle pack, as if waiting to see how the race will turn out, until...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Grass Wonder just jumped out front! But... isn't her running
kinda... strange?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I think the racer alongside her got shaky. Look at the course—it's in
bad shape after that last race.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: It looks like Grass Wonder ran up ahead to avoid a potential collision.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's in the lead with only 200 meters to go! The
competition's not far behind!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Can she stay ahead?! And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Grass Wonder was ahead until the last moment, but lost it
by a nose, finishing second.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey, nice work, Grass! You, well...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, how unfortunate! I lost it by a mere step.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But this experience will serve me well. I will endeavor to make the
next race a first-place victory.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh, y-yeah! Let's both try real hard!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
What a bummer for Grass. Without that hiccup in the middle, I bet
she had the skills to pull off first place!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
But that blink-of-the-eye response was brilliant. I'd love to have her
on the team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the final result, everyone seems impressed by Grass's
performance. I'm sure she'll get plenty of trainers coming to scout her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At least, that's what I thought...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, El? What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Training tonight? I'd be up to join you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I think not... Today's race has taken a toll on me, so I plan on resting
up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not long after, a certain rumor began to spread around the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Grass Wonder turns down every single scouting offer."
